Dallas crime family.description: The Dallas crime family, also known as the Civello crime family, was an Italian-American Mafia crime family based in Dallas, Texas. Founded around 1910 by Carlo Piranio, it operated primarily in the Dallas metropolitan area and throughout Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas. The family was involved in racketeering, loansharking, drug trafficking, and other criminal activities. It became defunct in the 1990s.

Okinawa-Kyokuryū-kai.description: The Okinawa-Kyokuryū-kai is a yakuza criminal organization based on the Okinawa island of Japan. Formed in 1990 after splitting from the Kyokuryu-kai, it is a designated yakuza group with an estimated 300 active members. It is the largest yakuza organization in Okinawa Prefecture, headquartered in Naha, and its official policy forbids drug trafficking.

descriptions: Kyokuryu-kai and Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai were in conflict for years after the split.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kyokuryu-kai had been in conflict with the Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai for years

descriptions: Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai split from Kyokuryu-kai in 1990, making it a splinter group.
edges.evidence_quote: The Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai was formed in 1990 when it split from Okinawa's main yakuza group, the Kyokuryu-kai.

Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club.description: The Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club is a mixed-race one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Gary, Indiana in 1967. It is one of the oldest and most well-known black outlaw motorcycle clubs in the United States, with chapters across the U.S. and international presence. The club is involved in illicit drug sales and is regarded as a criminal organization by law enforcement.

Galloway Boys.description: The Galloway Boys are a gang based in Southern Ontario, Canada, originating in the Scarborough district of Toronto. Founded in the early 1980s, they expanded into Durham Region and Kawartha Lakes. They are involved in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, murder, burglary, and racketeering, and have been linked to multiple gang-related violence incidents including the Danzig Street shooting.

descriptions: The Iavarazzo family was entrusted with the regency of the Casalesi in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2011 la reggenza del clan viene affidata alla famiglia Iavarazzo di Villa Literno , già imparentati con gli Schiavone.

Dinner Set Gang.description: A gang of thieves active in the late 1960s and 1970s, known for burglarizing wealthy Americans' homes while the victims were at dinner. Based in the United States, the gang was led by brothers-in-law Peter Salerno and Dominick Latella. They stole millions in jewels, targeting families like the DuPonts and Flaglers. The gang avoided violence and carried no weapons.

descriptions: Palamara, through Sculli, are active in illegal betting alongside Albanian and Bosnian criminals who support the Fiandaca family.
edges.evidence_quote: A Genova sono stanziati gli alleati Palamara e che tramite il nipote del Morabito Giuseppe Sculli , sono attivi in particolar modo nel totonero insieme a malavitosi albanesi e bosniaci come Safet Altic, spalleggiatori delle famiglie siciliane Fiandaca, Morso, Rinzivillo e Emmanuello di Gela .

Tree Top Piru.description: The Tree Top Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the Bloods, founded in Compton, California in the 1970s. Named after tree-named streets in its territory, it has spread to other U.S. states including Tennessee, Texas, and Maryland. The gang is known for its connection to rappers such as DJ Quik and YG, and has been involved in violent crimes including murder.
